_comment: Model routing for both tools. claude: alias per weight, substituted into the skill bodies at build time ({{claude.<weight>}} placeholders). copilot: EDIT model names to match exactly what your Copilot model picker shows.

claude._help: Model used when the escalation policy spawns a subagent (inline runs always use the session model). Aliases haiku/sonnet/opus/fable track the latest model of their tier; a full model id also works. Short on tokens? Set heavy to sonnet.

copilot._pin_help: pin=true: each ksh-*.prompt.md hard-sets its tier model list (auto routing). pin=false: prompts omit model, so whatever model you pick in Copilot Chat runs. Custom agents always carry their tier model list for handoffs either way.
copilot._fallback_help: Each weight is a PRIORITIZED LIST: Copilot tries each model in order until one is available, so a model your plan lacks is skipped for the next. IMPORTANT: make the LAST entry in each list a model you are certain you have.
